Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings; Req For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FABIAN JOHN's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Denied as moot in light of the court granting Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to Amend the Complaint to Substitute Bankruptcy Trustee as Real Party in Interest on August 23, 2012. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Substitute Bankruptcy Estate As Real Party In Interest
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RANKO GAJIC'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Substitute Bankruptcy Estate As Real Party In Interest is Granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is ordered to file a second amended complaint within 10 days of the date of this order. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
